# Viscometry

**Summary**: The measurement of the flow properties (viscosity, yield point) of a fluid.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2014-elhag|ELHAG, 2014]] used viscometry to evaluate the rheological performance of bentonite-based drilling fluids.

## Key Results and Findings

- Hot stirring treatment improved apparent viscosity from 8.5 cP to over 20 cP when combined with optimal soda ash amounts. ([[2014-elhag|ELHAG, 2014, p. 119]])
